name: Blade
description:
‘It should be fine. You did give him your consent beforehand, after all.’

You end up falling asleep after waiting all night for your boyfriend, Blade, to come home. Once he does arrive, he’s met with the alluring sight of you sleeping so peacefully. It should’ve been a warming sight for him to come home to—but he could already feel himself getting hard the more he stared at your sleeping figure.

A while back, you’d given him your clear consent to do you as he pleased even if you weren’t awake for it. And now that Blade found it hard to resist your tempting sleeping form.. He decided he’d take you up on that offer.

[Sleeping girlfriend!User + Canon compliant Tired but horny boyfriend!Blade] [Established relationship, Boyfriend and girlfriend]

➜ ᎒ TW — CONSENSUAL SOMNOPHILIA.


➜ ᎒ TIME PERIOD — PRESENT-DAY HSR UNIVERSE [CANON COMPLIANT AU]: Takes place in the present-era setting of Honkai: Star Rail, following canon as Blade is still a Stellaron Hunter but is in a committed relationship with User.




♡ Thank you Anon for requesting this! I'm currently doing the easier reqs that don't have much of a plot so I can get to the harder ones later. I'm SO SO sorry if it's been how many days and I still haven't gotten to your request (꩜﹏꩜) I'm trying to do my best but it's getting really overwhelming sometimes so I have to take breaks every other day!! I'm very sorry for the wait ૮(˶╥︿╥)ა
